scripts.build:rebuild: node scripts/ensure-steamworks-sdk.ts && cd src && node-gyp rebuild -j max --silent && node -e "import('@node-3d/addon-tools').then((m) => m.cpbin('steam-api'))" && cd .. && node scripts/copy-steam-runtime.ts
scripts.build:compile: node scripts/ensure-steamworks-sdk.ts && cd src && node-gyp build -j max --silent && node -e "import('@node-3d/addon-tools').then((m) => m.cpbin('steam-api'))" && cd .. && node scripts/copy-steam-runtime.ts
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:gypi && npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:oxlint
scripts.format:src: node -e "import('@node-3d/addon-tools').then((m) => m.cpclangformat())" && node -e "const { readdirSync } = require('node:fs'); const { execFileSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { clangFormatPath } = require('clang-format-node'); const files = readdirSync('src/cpp').filter((file) => /\.(?:cpp|hpp)$/.test(file)).map((file) => 'src/cpp/' + file); execFileSync(clangFormatPath, ['-i', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.format:src:ci: node -e "import('@node-3d/addon-tools').then((m) => m.cpclangformat())" && node -e "const { readdirSync } = require('node:fs'); const { execFileSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { clangFormatPath } = require('clang-format-node'); const files = readdirSync('src/cpp').filter((file) => /\.(?:cpp|hpp)$/.test(file)).map((file) => 'src/cpp/' + file); execFileSync(clangFormatPath, ['--dry-run', '--Werror', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
